nasb.text: “You shall not take a bribe, for a bribe blinds the clear-sighted and subverts the cause of the just.

esv.text: And you shall take no bribe, for a bribe blinds the clear-sighted and subverts the cause of those who are in the right.

cnv.text: 不可受賄賂，因為賄賂能使明眼人變瞎，又能歪曲義人的話。

ccb.text: 不可收受贿赂，因为贿赂蒙蔽人的眼目，使人颠倒是非。
